## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new GrowthX employees and guide them through their first day and week.](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires (Iana, Stevie, Tyler) introduced; diverse roles & locations](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Day 1 focus: tool setup (1Password, Slack, Notion, Zoom, Linear, Fathom)](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Week 1: extensive reading, videos, 3 onboarding bootcamps](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Key policies: unlimited PTO, employee referral program ($5-10k bonus)](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)

## Topics

### New Employee Introductions

  - [Iana (Brazil): Content operations specialist, ex-Russia, journalism/AI background](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Stevie (location unspecified): New product manager, first day](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Tyler (Houston, TX): First account executive hire](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=140.0)
  - [Alice (Kenya): Executive assistant, 1+ year at GrowthX, works Pacific time](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)

### Day 1 Onboarding Tasks

  - [Set up essential tools: 1Password, Slack, Notion, Zoom, Linear, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Meet with manager; assigned onboarding buddy](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Linear project created for tracking onboarding progress](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [GitBot integration for daily updates in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)

### Week 1 Onboarding Overview

  - [Extensive reading on company history, operations (CEO-authored docs)](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Watch informational videos](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Attend 3 onboarding bootcamps:](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
    1.  Today with Alice
    2.  Thursday with Marcel (CEO)
    3.  Friday with Kyle (Sales Lead)

### Company Policies & Culture

  - [Unlimited PTO: No approval needed, block calendar & notify team](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Employee referral program: Up to $10k for engineering, $5k for non-engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with Pacific time required for non-US employees](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings (next week: new hire introductions)](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)

### Tools & Resources

  - [Notion: Primary knowledge base, includes onboarding resources](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Linear: Project/task management, onboarding checklist](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [Slack: Primary communication, includes IT & tools support channel](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Complete Day 1 tasks in Linear project](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Begin Week 1 reading and video materials](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Prepare questions for upcoming onboarding bootcamps](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Set up GitBot for daily updates](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Prepare brief intro for next week's all-hands meeting](https://fathom.video/share/BpdBfzfmjdWTUERYsPjZNw94rFPEGoze?tab=summary&timestamp=875.0)
